# assumes you have already pushed x/a then y/b; ie: y/b should be on top of the stack

push 4 loop_counter    # loop counter

# Initial accumulator values
push 1 b_acc
push 2 a_acc

# Repeat 4 times (Ruby's 4.times)
debug_stack

# new_a1 = a_acc * a_acc / FACTOR
dup
dup
debug_stack
*
push 50 FACTOR
/ new_a1

# stack: new_a1, a_acc, b_acc, loop_counter, b, a

# new_a2 = b_acc * b_acc / FACTOR
push 3
push 2
roll
# stack: b_acc, new_a1, a_acc, loop_counter, b, a
dup
dup
*
push 50 FACTOR
/ new_a2

# stack: new_a2, b_acc, new_a1, a_acc, loop_counter, b, a

# new_a = new_a1 - new_a2
push 3
push 2
roll

push 2
push 1
roll

- new_a
# stack: new_a, b_acc, a_acc, loop_counter, b, a

# ((((a_acc b_acc *) FACTOR /) dup) +)
# new_b = a_acc * b_acc / FACTOR + a_acc * b_acc / FACTOR
debug_stack
push 2
push 1
roll

push 3
push 2
roll
* a_acc_times_b_acc # a_acc * b_acc
push 50 FACTOR
divide
dup
+ new_b

debug_stack
# stack: new_b, new_a, loop_counter, b, a

# b_acc = new_b + b
# pull b
push 4
push 3
roll
dup b_copy

# pull new_b
push 3
push 2
roll

debug_stack

+ b_acc
# stack b_acc, b, new_a, loop_counter, a

# a_acc = new_a + a
push 5
push 4
roll # pull a
dup a_copy

push 5
push 4
roll # pull new_a
+ a_acc

# stack: a_acc, a, b_acc, b, loop_counter
debug_stack

# tidy stack into this order: loop_counter_copy, a_acc, b_acc, loop_counter, b, a

# pull loop_counter, decrement, dup
push 5
push 4
roll # pull loop_counter

push 1
- loop_counter
dup loop_counter_copy

# stack: loop_counter_copy, loop_counter, a_acc, a, b_acc, b

push 4
push 3
roll # pull a

push 6
push 5
roll # pull b
push 4
push 3
roll # pull loop_counter
push 6
push 5
roll # pull b_acc
# stack: b_acc, loop_counter, b, a, loop_counter_copy, a_acc
push 6
push 5
roll # pull a_acc
push 6
push 5
roll # pull loop_counter_copy

debug_stack
# stack: loop_counter_copy, a_acc, b_acc, loop_counter, b, a

branch 10 # loop 4 times

# stack: a_acc, b_acc, loop_counter, b, a

# (a_acc*a_acc/FACTOR + b_acc*b_acc/FACTOR)
# push 5
# push 4
# roll # pull a_acc
dup
* a_acc2
push 50 FACTOR
divide a_final
debug_stack

push 2
push 1
roll # pull b_acc
debug_stack
dup
* b_acc2
push 50 FACTOR
divide b_final
debug_stack
+ return

debug_stack
# Clear out everything but the return value
# Move return to the bottom
push 4
push 1
roll
# pop the rest
pop
pop
pop

push 200 cutoff
greater comp
push 10
*
push 32
+
out_char
